title.rendered: Starts January 28! Earn a 2026 Certificate in Artificial Intelligence (AI) for Marketing & Fundraising 💻

content.rendered: The 2026 Certificate in Artificial Intelligence (AI) for Marketing & Fundraising program provides an honest, practical approach to using AI for nonprofit marketing and fundraising—and illuminates why AI literacy is a must-have skill for 2025 and onward.

excerpt.rendered: The 2026 Certificate in Artificial Intelligence (AI) for Marketing & Fundraising program provides an honest, practical approach to using AI for nonprofit marketing and fundraising—and illuminates why AI literacy is a must-have skill for 2026 and onward.
